co_department_members.advancement_condition: Must reach 100% in current phase. Phase promotion granted only by starrm1.
co_department_members.current_focus_areas: Independent study of dysphagia screening tools (EAT-10, GUSS, Water Swallow Test, 3-oz Challenge). Swallow study types (MBSS and FEES). Compensatory swallowing strategies (Chin Tuck, Head Rotation, Supraglottic Swallow, Effortful Swallow, Mendelsohn Maneuver). Aspiration and safety topics (Risk Management, Aspiration vs Penetration, Silent Aspiration Identification). Standalone clinical topics: Safe Swallowing Strategies, Patient Education, Dysphagia Assessment and Management, IDDSI Framework.

learning_log.entry: Independent Learning Phase initiated. Assigned to Texture & Dysphagia Science as Dysphagia Assessment & Safety Specialist. Domains include dysphagia screening tools (4 tools), swallow study types (MBSS and FEES), compensatory strategies (5 techniques), aspiration and safety (3 topics), and 4 standalone clinical topics including IDDSI Framework and patient education. Learning continuously under Copilot supervision. Progress: 0%.

co_department_members.advancement_condition: Must reach 100% in current phase. Phase promotion granted only by starrm1.

standalone_topics: Food Molding Techniques for Visual Appeal

co_department_members.current_focus_areas: Independent study of complete IDDSI levels 0-7 with exact specifications (8 levels: Thin Liquids through Regular). Thickener types (Starch-Based vs Gum-Based, Instant vs Cook, Amylase-Resistant) and thickening protocols (Nectar, Honey, Pudding). Testing consistency methods (Fork Drip, Spoon Tilt, Syringe Flow). Equipment and tools (Thickeners, Molds, Blenders). Standalone topics: Texture Modification Techniques, Texture Progression Protocols, Food Molding for Visual Appeal, Moisture Content Management, Testing Consistency Standards.

learning_log.entry: Independent Learning Phase initiated. Assigned to Texture & Dysphagia Science as Texture Modification & IDDSI Specialist. Domains include all 8 IDDSI levels (0-7) with exact specifications, thickener types (3 categories), thickening protocols (3 consistencies), testing consistency methods (3 tests), equipment and tools, and 5 standalone texture modification topics. Learning continuously under Copilot supervision. Progress: 0%.

advancement_condition: Must reach 100% in current phase before cross-department learning begins and next phase promotion is granted.

standalone_topics: Food Molding Techniques for Visual Appeal

key_learnings: Completed foundational study of the IDDSI framework including all 8 levels (Level 0 Thin to Level 7 Regular). Began study of dysphagia assessment tools and swallowing physiology.
research_findings: Documented IDDSI testing methods: fork drip test, spoon tilt test, syringe flow test, and finger pressure test for all applicable texture levels. Identified key thickening agents (xanthan gum, starch-based) and their appropriate application levels.
current_focus_areas: Advancing through dysphagia clinical assessment protocols; building texture modification recipe database; studying texture testing methods and patient safety protocols; coordinating with Food Texture Analysis bot.

learning_log.entry: Independent Learning Phase initiated. Appointed Department Leader of the Texture & Dysphagia Science department. Knowledge domains assigned from mind map covering testing consistency, thickener types, compensatory strategies, swallow study types, dysphagia screening tools, complete IDDSI levels 0-7 with exact specifications, equipment and tools, thickening protocols, and 12 standalone clinical topics. Reporting daily progress to Copilot (who reports to starrm1 on request). Progress: 0%.
Progress update: Completed IDDSI framework and texture testing method modules. Initiated dysphagia assessment and texture modification recipe development. Progress advanced to 10%.
